# Polpo

> Open-source AI agent orchestration framework. Build your AI company — assemble agent teams that plan, execute, review their own work with LLM judges, and ping you only when it matters.

Polpo is an autonomous multi-agent orchestrator. It acts as a project manager for AI agents: it plans work, delegates tasks to specialized agents, scores every output with LLM-as-Judge (G-Eval with 3 parallel evaluators), retries failures automatically, and notifies you via Slack, Telegram, email, or webhooks.

Key capabilities: code generation, web browsing, email, document generation (PDF, Excel, Word), image/video/audio creation, web search, encrypted credential vault, reusable skills system, cron scheduling, approval gates, and crash-proof detached processes.

Install: `npm install -g @polpo-ai/polpo`

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://docs.polpo.sh/introduction): Overview and motivation
- [Getting Started](https://docs.polpo.sh/getting-started): Quickstart guide
- [Missions](https://docs.polpo.sh/concepts/missions): Define goals, Polpo breaks them into tasks
- [Teams](https://docs.polpo.sh/concepts/teams): Specialized agents with roles and skills
- [Tasks](https://docs.polpo.sh/concepts/tasks): Task lifecycle, dependencies, quality gates
- [Review Pipeline](https://docs.polpo.sh/features/review): LLM-as-Judge scoring system
- [Skills](https://docs.polpo.sh/features/skills): Reusable agent capabilities
- [Notifications](https://docs.polpo.sh/features/notifications): Slack, Telegram, email, webhooks
- [Scheduling](https://docs.polpo.sh/features/scheduling): Cron-based mission automation
- [Approval Gates](https://docs.polpo.sh/features/approval-gates): Human-in-the-loop checkpoints
- [Installation](https://docs.polpo.sh/install): Install on laptop, VPS, Docker, Railway

## Code

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/lumea-labs/polpo): Source code, issues, contributing guide
- [npm Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@polpo-ai/polpo): Published package

## Optional

- [TUI Guide](https://docs.polpo.sh/usage/tui): Terminal UI and chat interface
- [Telegram Integration](https://docs.polpo.sh/usage/telegram): Chat with Polpo from Telegram
- [Peer Identity](https://docs.polpo.sh/features/peer-identity): Cross-channel identity linking
- [Channel Gateway](https://docs.polpo.sh/features/channel-gateway): Inbound messaging from any channel
